prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 2 of a layered paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample and defines the exact paper-collage medium, restrained ink line, mineral pigments and deckled paper shadows
Primary request: a descending mountain footpath through bamboo and weathered rocks, bending from upper left toward lower right and leading toward a distant creek
Scene/backdrop: generalized ancient Chinese mountain setting, cool cloud mountains and open sky; no buildings, no people
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, layered cut-paper silhouettes, visible mulberry-paper fibers, matte celadon and tea-brown pigments, subtle print misregistration
Composition/framing: wide 16:9; path remains unobstructed for a walking character; middle area readable; calm open upper region and subtitle-safe lower band; do not include foreground branches because they are a separate layer
Lighting/mood: breezy cool afternoon, unsettled but quiet
Constraints: no written characters, captions, signs, watermark, logo, people, animals, modern items or mockup frame
Avoid: glossy 3D, plastic cartoon, photorealism, anime, dramatic lens flare, crowded vegetation, text-like marks
